summary: A brief exchange of text messages between Mark Zuckerberg and Elon Musk. Zuckerberg provides a heads-up about a leaked Meta letter supporting Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI and offers platform moderation support against doxxing for Musk's team.

signature_quotes.text: Wanted to make sure you heard this from me.
signature_quotes.context: Giving Elon Musk a heads-up that a Meta letter supporting his lawsuit against OpenAI had been leaked to the public.

signature_quotes.text: I’ve got our teams on alert to take down content doxxing or threatening the people on your team.
signature_quotes.context: Offering support to Elon Musk regarding threats against the DOGE team.
